mapper.update: update ${sqlMap.table.toSql()} set is_login = #{isLogin}, update_date=now() where user_code = #{userCode}
update ${sqlMap.table.toSql()} set is_withdrawals = #{isWithdrawals}, update_date=now() where user_code = #{userCode}
update ${sqlMap.table.toSql()} set is_transaction = #{isTransaction}, update_date=now() where user_code = #{userCode}
